charaepi_ch0295_90_omodaka/2301_1201_020:
Haha...that was a Pokémon battle without
a hint of compromise.
charaepi_ch0295_90_omodaka/2301_1201_030:
Yes. I expected no less from you, Geeta.
You are magnificently skilled.
charaepi_ch0295_90_omodaka/2301_0401_060:
Steven here was accompanying me at
my request.
charaepi_ch0295_90_omodaka/2301_0402_080:
Why, [Name:PlayerNickname ]. I did not
expect to meet you in this place.
charaepi_ch0295_90_omodaka/2301_1201_090:
Geeta is interested in gemstones and came
to ask me about jewels.
charaepi_ch0295_90_omodaka/2301_1201_100:
I was surprised, but apparently, Glimmora’s
petals resemble Tera Jewels!
charaepi_ch0295_90_omodaka/2301_1201_110:
Right. It is said they are crystallized poison
energy, though much about them is unknown.
charaepi_ch0295_90_omodaka/2301_1201_120:
By learning more about jewels, I thought
I could unravel Glimmora’s mysteries, helping
us understand each other as a sync pair.
charaepi_ch0295_90_omodaka/2301_1201_130:
First we were having a battle to
demonstrate his strength.
charaepi_ch0295_90_omodaka/2301_1201_140:
However, Steven and I have both awakened
our arc suits.
charaepi_ch0295_90_omodaka/2301_1201_150:
As someone who aims for greater heights
with others, I couldn’t help getting fired up.
charaepi_ch0295_90_omodaka/2301_1201_160:
And with Geeta showing that much spirit,
I had to rise to the occasion.
charaepi_ch0295_90_omodaka/2301_1201_170:
Glimmora shone beautifully when he
Terastallized!
charaepi_ch0295_90_omodaka/2301_1201_180:
Geeta! Please let me study Glimmora
in greater detail!
charaepi_ch0295_90_omodaka/2301_1201_190: Of course. That is why I’ve come to see you.
charaepi_ch0295_90_omodaka/2301_1201_200:
I sensed a new possibility from your
Metagross...and its Mega Evolution.
charaepi_ch0295_90_omodaka/2301_1201_210:
I do hope you’ll allow me to continue
learning from you and your partner.
charaepi_ch0295_90_omodaka/2301_1201_230:
Well, it must be fate that we could meet
[Name:PlayerNickname ] here.
charaepi_ch0295_90_omodaka/2301_1201_240:
Why don’t we have a battle between the
three of us?
charaepi_ch0295_90_omodaka/2301_1201_250:
It will surely lead to achieving greater
synergy.
charaepi_ch0295_90_omodaka/2301_0301_270: Yeah! Let’s give it a whirl!
charaepi_ch0295_90_omodaka/2301_0401_280: I thought you would say that.
charaepi_ch0295_90_omodaka/2301_0302_290: I’m not losing to either of you!
charaepi_ch0295_90_omodaka/2301_1201_310:
I look forward to witnessing your
fantastic skills!
